description: PRE-COMMITTED before any 2003-2015 data was downloaded: run the frozen recipe (features v1.3, lgbm config, meta config, ev 0.03, thresholds FIXED at 0.65/0.70/0.775) on EURUSD/GBPUSD/USDJPY 2003-2015, era-internal split (meta trained <=2010, scored 2011-2015). EXPECTATION: monotone staircase with WR above 53.5% break-even at all three thresholds. This entry is written BEFORE the download.

Outcome of the pre-registered era test: REPRODUCED per pre-committed criteria (monotone, above break-even, p<=2e-5 at all fixed thresholds) BUT magnitude far smaller: 56.7-57.1% vs 67-79% on modern data. The staircase rise is 0.4pt vs 12pt. Least-contaminated estimate we own; modern-era levels are partly era-specific and/or research-inflated.
pre-cutoff broker window: spot vs OTC edge split + deployed-meta transfer buckets
day-of-week feature ablation on decade EURUSD (planned)
OTC 47.1% (n=136 ind) vs spot 65.5% (n=2103) pre-cutoff; meta slope transfers on spot, weakly on OTC. Edge treated as spot-only; trade track restricted to spot.
outcome: OTC below break-even - excluded from demo trading

description: day-of-week sin/cos on decade EURUSD: deltas -0.4/+1.6/-0.7/+0.6pt across meta thresholds - alternating sign, no consistent effect
outcome: REJECTED - wash; hour+meta already absorb calendar structure

description: three-agent audit: 25+ findings; fixed evaluator cutoff guard, nan verdict, verdict/alpha accounting, H4 evaluation, PBO contamination, Brier vacuity, screening nulls, live runner dead-connection stall, single-instance lock, settlement-on-exit, per-asset freshness, payout falsy bug, vacuous label tests, mtf warmup fabrication, storage NaN conflicts, plist throttle, hook threshold
outcome: all fixes verified, 133 tests green, honest recomputation confirms conclusions
